title: BEM-801 verify marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:27 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
resp=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
if resp:
    status='response_files_present_filter_needed'; next_action='filter real Claude response and process if valid'
elif runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'):
    status='runtime_seen'; next_action='diagnose Claude action outcome'
elif results:
    status='dispatch_results_present'; next_action='parse dispatch result statuses'
elif marker.get('status'):
    status='processor_marker_seen_no_results'; next_action='processor runs but creates no results; inspect queue files and shell loop'
else:
    status='processor_marker_missing'; next_action='codex-runner processor step not executing; inspect YAML placement/lint'
state={'bem':'BEM-801','status':status,'marker':marker,'result_files':results[-20:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'response_files':resp[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem801_verify_queue_processor_marker.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem801_verify_queue_processor_marker.md').write_text('# BEM-801 | Verify Queue Processor Marker | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem801_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-801'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem801_verify_queue_processor_marker.json','governance/reports/bem801_verify_queue_processor_marker.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem801_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified queue processor marker, dispatch results, Claude runtime state, and response files after BEM-800 tick')
"""
